meta.title: Rose Valley Park
meta.description: Complete guide to Rose Valley Park in Chișinău. Learn about this scenic spot, its location, visiting information, and travel tips.

intro.title: Discover Rose Valley Park
intro.description: Rose Valley Park (Parcul „Valea Trandafirilor”) is one of the most beautiful and well-known recreational areas in Chișinău, Moldova. Located along the Bâc River, the park offers a relaxing atmosphere, perfect for walks, picnics, and outdoor activities. It is a favorite spot for both locals and tourists.

visitGuide.title: Visit Tips
items: The park is accessible year-round and admission is free.
Great place for a picnic or a relaxing walk on the picturesque alleys.
Provides excellent views of the lake and abundant vegetation.

sections.title: Historical Background
sections.content: Rose Valley Park was established in the 20th century and quickly became one of the main recreational attractions in Chișinău. Its name comes from the rich rose plantations that were planted here, transforming the area into a true floral paradise.

sections.title: Geography & Layout
sections.content: The park is located near the center of Chișinău and stretches along the Bâc River. The layout includes pedestrian alleys, benches, relaxation areas, and a picturesque lake where visitors can relax and enjoy nature.

sections.title: Cultural Significance
sections.content: As one of the most popular recreational places in Moldova's capital, the park often hosts cultural events, festivals, and outdoor activities, being an important meeting point for the local community.

sections.title: Ecology & Flora
sections.content: The park hosts an impressive variety of plant species, including numerous rose varieties, ornamental trees, and spontaneous flora. Many bird species find shelter here, making it an important urban refuge for biodiversity.

hours.title: Visiting Hours
hours.bestTimeSummer: Summer: Sunny days, great for picnics and outdoor activities
hours.bestTimeAutumn: Autumn: Beautiful foliage and relaxing atmosphere
hours.tip: The park is open 24/7, accessible at any time of the day.

transport.title: How to Get Here
transport.fromCenterDesc: The park is within accessible walking distance from the city center.
transport.fromStationDesc: Accessible by local public transport, with stops nearby.
transport.fromAirportDesc: From Chișinău International Airport, you can take a taxi or public transport to the city center.
transport.publicTransportDesc: Well connected by Chișinău public transport network, with stops nearby.
transport.walkingDesc: Accessible on foot from multiple areas of the city, being centrally located.
transport.drivingDesc: Accessible by car, with parking options nearby.

route.title: Recommended Route
route.overview: Take a leisurely stroll through the park and surroundings.
steps: Start at the main entrance of the park
Walk along the picturesque alleys among roses
Stop at the picnic areas for relaxation
Enjoy the view of vegetation and water

spots.title: Valea Trandafirilor Lake
spots.description: The picturesque lake in the middle of the park offers excellent landscape photography opportunities, especially during sunrise or sunset.

spots.title: Rose Alleys
spots.description: Alleys bordered by blooming roses offer a perfect frame for spring and summer photography.

spots.title: Picnic Areas
spots.description: The landscaped picnic areas offer a relaxing frame for group photos or portraits.

spots.title: Vegetation Viewpoint
spots.description: The abundant vegetation and old trees create a perfect natural frame for nature photos.

hotels.name: Chișinău Center
hotels.desc: The central area of Chișinău offers easy access to Rose Valley Park, with numerous hotels, restaurants, and shops nearby.

hotels.name: Buiucani Area
hotels.desc: A quiet and picturesque neighborhood, located near the park, ideal for those seeking peace and fresh air.

hotels.name: Riscani Area
hotels.desc: Located near the park, this area offers diverse accommodation options, from budget hotels to premium apartments.

hotels.name: Center Area (Great National Assembly Square)
hotels.desc: The heart of the capital, close to main tourist attractions and within accessible walking distance to Rose Valley Park.

gallery.title: Photo Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Scenic Views of Rose Valley Park

reviews.title: Visitor Reviews
reviews.declaration: Visitor feedback can be viewed via Google Maps.
reviews.moreReviews: View more reviews on Google Maps

items.name: Ion P.
items.text: Absolutely one of the most beautiful parks in Chișinău. I always come here to relax and take walks. It's a wonderful place for family and friends.

items.name: Maria L.
items.text: Perfect place for picnics and walks. The vegetation is superb, and the lake adds a note of peace and beauty to the place.

items.name: Andrei M.
items.text: A beautiful and well-maintained park. Ideal for evening or morning walks. I warmly recommend it to everyone visiting Chișinău.

items.name: Elena K.
items.text: Being a nature lover, I was deeply impressed by the diversity of flowers and roses in this park. A true corner of paradise in the middle of the city.

items.name: Vasile T.
items.text: Excellent place for family walks. The alleys are well maintained, and the atmosphere is very relaxing. I visit it every weekend.

items.name: Oxana R.
items.text: Compared to the hustle and bustle of the center, this park offers a quiet refuge. The feeling of peace and abundant greenery makes it one of my favorite places.

officialManagement.title: About Rose Valley Park
officialManagement.text: Rose Valley Park (Parcul „Valea Trandafirilor”) is a major urban park in Chișinău, Moldova, being a perfect example of combining nature with urban recreation.
